name: Diamond Preferred
effective_cost: Free — no annual fee, but the entire value proposition is the 0% intro APR window

verdict.text: Not a rewards card — worth it only for a balance transfer or 0% intro window

earn_note: Diamond Preferred earns no cash back, points, or miles of any kind — it's built entirely around a long 0% intro APR window, not rewards. If you want a Citi card that also earns while you carry it, look at a ThankYou Rewards card like Citi Strata instead; if you specifically need 0% APR with the longest possible runway, this and Citi Simplicity are the two Citi cards built for exactly that.

points.note: No points or cash-back program of any kind. The entire value proposition is 0% intro APR: 12 months on purchases and 21 months on balance transfers from account opening (balance transfers must post within the first 4 months), then a 16.49%–27.24% variable ongoing APR based on creditworthiness. This is one of the longest 0% balance-transfer windows Citi offers on any card.

transfer_partners.highlight: No rewards currency exists on this card, so there is nothing to transfer.

protection_note: Bare-bones by design. Citi's own page for this card lists fraud liability protection and Mastercard ID Theft Protection but no purchase protection, extended warranty, or travel insurance suite — treat this as carrying none of that coverage.
rental_note: No rental car coverage advertised — use a different card for rentals.

services.name: 0% intro APR
services.detail: 0% for 12 months on purchases and 21 months on balance transfers from account opening; balance transfers must be completed within the first 4 months. A 16.49%–27.24% variable APR applies after the intro periods end, based on creditworthiness.

services.name: Balance transfer fee
services.detail: 3% of each transfer ($5 minimum) if completed within the first 4 months of account opening; 5% of each transfer ($5 minimum) after that.

services.name: Late payment / penalty APR
services.detail: Unlike Citi Simplicity, this card does carry a late fee (up to $41) and a variable penalty APR that can apply after a late payment — Citi doesn't publish the exact penalty rate on its public summary page, so check your card agreement for the precise figure.

services.name: Foreign transaction fee applies
services.detail: 3% of the U.S. dollar amount of each transaction (Citi's standard rate, matching Simplicity and the Secured Mastercard) — not built for international use.

services.name: Citi Flex Pay
services.detail: Convert eligible purchases into fixed monthly payments while continuing to use the card normally.

services.name: Citi Entertainment & Citi Travel
services.detail: Presale ticket access to concerts and events, plus Citi's own travel-booking portal.

services.name: Free FICO Score access
services.detail: View your FICO Score at no cost through the Citi app or site.

services.name: Citi Quick Lock
services.detail: Instantly lock and unlock the card from the app if it's misplaced.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Free to add — no annual fee for authorized users
No rewards earned — this card has no rewards program to share

additional_cards.note: Free to add, but since Diamond Preferred itself earns nothing, the only upside for an authorized user is shared access to spending power during the 0% intro APR window, not rewards.
